verses.1: Blessed is he who considers the poor.
verses.2: The LORD will preserve him, and keep him alive.
verses.3: The LORD will sustain him on his sickbed,
verses.4: I said, “LORD, have mercy on me!
verses.5: My enemies speak evil against me:
verses.6: If he comes to see me, he speaks falsehood.
verses.7: All who hate me whisper together against me.
verses.8: “An evil disease”, they say, “has afflicted him.
verses.9: Yes, my own familiar friend, in whom I trusted,
verses.10: But you, LORD, have mercy on me, and raise me up,
verses.11: By this I know that you delight in me,
verses.12: As for me, you uphold me in my integrity,
verses.13: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel,
